title: PolicyDecisionRef v1
description: Portable reference to one arbiter routing decision (contracts roadmap phase 2, RD-002). decision_id is minted by arbiter as the decisions-table rowid and surfaced in the route_task response at metadata.decision_id; outcomes reference it via FK, and report_outcome resolves it from task_id when omitted. Consumers persist this record to correlate a decision with later outcomes and work items (task_id doubles as the WorkCorrelation join key). See rationale.md.

decision_id.description: SQLite rowid of the decision, minted by arbiter. int64.

task_id.description: Work-item key the decision was made for (= WorkCorrelation work_item_id).

action.description: Decision vocabulary. NOT a work-item lifecycle status — do not project it onto WorkCorrelation's common enum.

chosen_agent.description: Agent id (<harness>@<model>); may be empty/null for reject.

confidence.description: Decision confidence as returned by route_task.

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the decision, if known to the consumer.
